description: Lisa clicks on March 22nd in the calendar to select it as her return date.
page_title: Webjet | Your fun to go guide for flights, hotels, cars & more
frame_description: The flight search calendar is open, showing March 2026.

description: The calendar UI updates to highlight the selected date range from March 1st to March 22nd.
frame_description: The calendar highlights the selected dates in blue.

description: Lisa clicks the 'Done' button to confirm her flight date selection.
page_title: Webjet | Your fun to go guide for flights, hotels, cars & more
frame_description: The user is clicking the blue 'Done' button at the bottom of the calendar overlay.

description: The calendar overlay closes, revealing the main flight search form with the updated dates.
frame_description: The calendar disappears and the homepage search widget is visible.

description: Lisa pauses with her cursor over the search button, likely reviewing her search criteria before proceeding.
page_title: Webjet | Your fun to go guide for flights, hotels, cars & more
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the 'Search Flights' button.

description: Lisa clicks the 'Search Flights' button to initiate the flight search.
page_title: Webjet | Your fun to go guide for flights, hotels, cars & more
frame_description: The user activates the purple search button.

description: A loading overlay with a plane animation appears as the search request is processed.
frame_description: A white loading screen with a red plane icon and 'Available airfares will be displayed shortly' text.

description: The browser navigates to the search results page, which takes several seconds to fully load and display flight options.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the loading state to the flight results list.

description: Lisa scrolls down the results page to view more flight options.
frame_description: The list of flight results moves vertically.

description: Lisa hovers over a British Airways flight option, possibly comparing its price or duration.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the British Airways result row.

description: Lisa hovers over a Qatar Airways flight option.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the Qatar Airways result row.

description: Lisa hovers over the 'Cheapest' sorting tab.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the sorting options at the top of the results list.

description: Lisa clicks the '1 more flight option' link to see more details for the Qatar Airways flight.
frame_description: The user clicks a text link within the Qatar Airways flight card.

description: The Qatar Airways flight card expands to reveal additional flight segments and timing details.
frame_description: The UI element expands downwards to show more content.

description: Lisa clicks the '1 more flight option' link for a Virgin Australia flight.
frame_description: The user clicks a text link within the Virgin Australia flight card.

description: The Virgin Australia flight card expands to show more details.
frame_description: The Virgin Australia result expands to show more flight information.

description: Lisa scrolls further down the page to explore more results.
Lisa hovers over another Virgin Australia flight option at the bottom of the visible list.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over a flight result near the bottom of the screen.
